use_cases: Enable or disable features in application settings panels
Toggle boolean states in forms such as dark mode or notifications
Use as on/off switches for user preferences in SaaS dashboards
Control e-commerce filters or product options
Switch between states in settings pages for any web application
ai_summary: A lightweight toggle switch component using Tailwind CSS that leverages CSS peer-checked selectors for state management. The switch features a pill-shaped track with a sliding dot, indigo color scheme when active, and includes accessible focus rings for keyboard navigation. Designed as a drop-in replacement for checkboxes with a more intuitive visual metaphor for boolean settings.
